Society of the Snow

La sociedad de la nieve

"Based on a remarkable true story."

8.0
2023MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

On October 13, 1972, Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571, chartered to take a rugby team to Chile, crashes into a glacier in the heart of the Andes.

Tags

rescuefriendshipbased on novel or bookprayer1970sbrotherhoodbased on true storyrugbyuruguaystruggle for survivalmountain climbinginspiringandes mountainshistorical dramaplane crash
